channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: How to Get a $150K Tech Job Without a Degree: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to How to Get a $150K Tech Job Without a Degree covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: How AI Is Changing Everyday Life in 2026: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to How AI Is Changing Everyday Life in 2026 covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Dev Smarts
item.description: Master 10 essential mental models for coding success, boosting productivity and problem-solving skills.

item.title: Agile: Reality vs Ritual
item.description: Uncover what truly drives Agile success: separate effective practices from mere rituals and boost your team's productivity.

item.title: 6 Essential Designs
item.description: Master 6 essential design patterns, boosting efficiency and code quality in your projects.

item.title: AI Widens Wealth Gap
item.description: See how AI exacerbates wealth inequality and find out which jobs are most at risk.

item.title: WebAssembly: When JavaScript Isn't Fast Enough: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to WebAssembly: When JavaScript Isn't Fast Enough covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Code Fast
item.description: Master a new programming language in weeks with proven strategies and techniques to boost coding speed and efficiency.

item.title: Tech Exodus (April 2026)
item.description: Uncover reasons behind mass developer exodus from Big Tech in April 2026, and what it means for the industry's future.

item.title: Access Denied?
item.description: Understand web accessibility laws and coding standards to ensure compliance and inclusivity.

item.title: Pair Up
item.description: Boost code quality and teamwork with pair programming. Find out when it's most effective.

item.title: AI Side Hustle
item.description: Build a lucrative AI side hustle with actionable strategies and expert insights to automate tasks and boost income.

item.title: AI Tools for Students: Study Smarter Not Harder: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to AI Tools for Students: Study Smarter Not Harder covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: A/B Testing: How to Run Experiments That Mean Something: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to A/B Testing: How to Run Experiments That Mean Something covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.description: A practical guide to Startup Failure Lessons from Founders Who Lost Everything covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Survive On-Call
item.description: Master on-call challenges with practical tips for stress management, effective communication, and prioritizing tasks to ensure a successful shift.

item.title: Price to Grow
item.description: Unlock optimal SaaS pricing: determine your product's value, calculate costs, and maximize revenue with actionable strategies.

item.title: RAG Simplified
item.description: Unlock Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) basics, understanding its components and applications in simple terms.

item.title: Kafka Simplified
item.description: Master Apache Kafka fundamentals, understand key concepts and build scalable data pipelines without needing data engineering expertise.

item.title: Break In: Tech Careers at 30+
item.description: Launch a tech career in your 30s, 40s, or 50s: Get actionable tips and insider advice to transition successfully.
